indication: Acute left ankle inversion injury, unable to bear weight
technique: AP, mortise, and lateral views of the left ankle obtained.
findings: No acute fracture identified. The medial and lateral malleoli are intact. The talar dome is preserved. The ankle mortise is symmetric. No widening of the syndesmosis. No cortical disruption of the calcaneus or talus. Lateral soft tissue swelling consistent with sprain. No joint effusion. Bony alignment normal.
impression:
1. No acute fracture.
2. Lateral soft tissue swelling consistent with inversion ankle sprain.
